text: Kal raat papa se meri promotion wali onsite trip ko lekar bohot behes hui, unhone saaf keh diya ki parivaar ki izzat beti-bahu ke bahar akele ghoomne se badhti nahi. Maine apna point rakhne ki koshish ki par mummy ne ishara kar diya ki bade-buzurgo ke samne zubaan na ladaun. Ab maine chupchap HR ko mana kar diya hai kyunki unka dil dukhakar aur ghar me kalesh karke milne wali kamyabi mere kisi kaam ki nahi.

Office ke late hours ko lekar kal raat papa aur sasur ji ne milkar meri itni beizzati ki jaise main koi gunah kar rahi hoon, aur behes bina kisi nateeje ke ruk gayi. Main janti hoon ki ghar ki zimmedari aur naukri dono mujhse handle ho sakti hain, par unhe lagta hai ki 'log kya kahenge' agar bahu raat ko ghar aayegi. Unka maan rakhne ke liye maine apna project lead ka role chhodne ka faisla kar liya hai taaki rishton me koi darar na aaye.

Kal raat papa ne saaf bol diya ki mere bachhe ki parvarish ke liye mujhe apni job chhod deni chahiye kyunki unhe lagta hai ki main parivaar se zyada apne career ko ahmiyat de rahi hoon. Main unhe samjhana chahti thi par unhone khandaan ki maryada aur maryada ka waasta dekar mujhe chup kara diya. Unki nazron me girne ke darr se aur guilt me aakar maine resignation mail draft kar liya hai taaki ghar ki shanti bani rahe.

Mera man tha ki main higher studies ke liye form bharun par kal raat papa ne behes ke beech keh diya ki ab aur padhne ki zidd karke parivaar ka naam mitti me mat milao. Unka authoritarian control itna hai ki main unhe palat kar jawab nahi de sakti warna joint family me padosi baatein banayenge. Maine chupchap apna application portal band kar diya kyunki unka ashirwad khone se bada mere liye koi nuksaan nahi hai.

Kal raat ki behes ke baad papa ne mujhse baat karna band kar diya hai kyunki maine unke bataye huye investment plan ke khilaf bolne ki himmat ki thi. Meri salary par unka poora haq hai ye wo hamesha kehte hain, par ab mujhe lagta hai ki meri apni koi identity hi nahi hai. Parivaar me sabke samne unka sar nicha na ho isliye maine subah unse maafi maang li aur wahi kiya jo wo chahte the taaki izzat bani rahe.
